# Smilery
> Smilery is an orthodontic practice offering braces, Invisalign, and clear aligner treatments for patients seeking straighter smiles.
## Main
- [Home](https://smilery.com): Overview of Smilery's orthodontic services, practice philosophy, and getting started with treatment.
- [Book Appointment](https://smilery.com/book-appointment): Schedule a consultation or appointment with the Smilery team.
- [About Us](https://smilery.com/about-us): Information about the Smilery practice, team, and approach to orthodontic care.
- [Contact](https://smilery.com/contact): Office location, phone, email, and hours for reaching Smilery.
## Services
- [Services Overview](https://smilery.com/services): Full list of orthodontic treatments offered at Smilery.
- [Braces](https://smilery.com/services/braces): Traditional braces treatment for correcting alignment and bite issues.
- [Invisalign](https://smilery.com/services/invisalign): Invisalign clear aligner therapy as an alternative to traditional braces.
- [Clear Aligners](https://smilery.com/services/clear-aligners): Clear aligner treatment options for discreet teeth straightening.
## Patient Resources
- [Blog](https://smilery.com/blog): Articles on orthodontic care, treatment options, and oral health tips.
- [Insurance](https://smilery.com/insurance): Information on accepted insurance plans and coverage.
- [Financing](https://smilery.com/financing): Payment plans and financing options for orthodontic treatment.
